name: Biome Bash
tagline: Five toony fighters, five wild biomes — last toon standing.
hero: a roster of five toony brawlers (pick one; AI runs the rest)
controls: ←→ move · ↑/SPACE jump (multi) · Z attack · X heavy · C special · V shield · ↓ fastfall
art: Gemini biome backdrops + keyart; characters are procedural Studio.Toon rigs (17-state animation machine)
music: Lyria 2 — a composed loop per biome + title (6 tracks)
designLens: flawless-victory gate: the champion autopilot wins every arena 1v3 without losing a stock, deterministically, on both renderers
